productDisplayName: Wildcraft Men Beige Wind Cheater Jackets
description: Style Note face the harsh winds in style with this trendy wind cheater jacket from the outdoor experts, wildcraft. This light weight jacket is just what you want to be wearing when speeding on your bike or when out on one of those adventure trips you so love going for. Product Details Beige wind cheater jacket, has a mock collar, hood behind the collar folded in with a velcro closure, branding on the left chest and back, zippered closure in front from the collar to the hemline, two insert pockets in the front above the hemline and a toggle strap at the hemline Material and Care Synthetic Machine wash cold Size Regular Fit The model (height 6' and chest 33") is wearing a size SPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown
